ItacPersonItem.Notes: Founder of the Accademia Fisico-matematica in Rome. Also member of the Accademia degli Alcionisti (Offida), see Fabiani, L`economia del tempo, in (1694). On Ciampini`s publications related to his Academies, see Ferdinando Fabiani, Il merito applaudito (1694)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
